image:image.image:title: Bhandi Baba — watercolor portrait of a sadhu by Ankit Agrawal
image:image.image:caption: Featured artwork: Bhandi Baba, watercolor on paper, 2017. Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Ankit Agrawal — Indian artist, founder of Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: Portrait of Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: भण्डि बाबा — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A wandering sadhu lost in his own smoke. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: ढलती मुस्कान — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A grandmother's laugh — every wrinkle a chapter. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: पगडण्डी — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A village trail, painted from memory. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: अनिद्रा — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: Wide eyes long past the hour of sleep. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: केतली — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: The kettle on the chai stove — copper and steam. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Frooty — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A late-90s mango juice carton — pure nostalgia. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: बनारसी सुबह — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: Banaras at dawn, painted from the ghat steps. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: बनारसी शाम — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: The same ghat at evening, lit by aarti flames. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: बनारसी धूप — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A watercolor study. Watercolor by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: आँचल — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A tribal father holding his sleeping child. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: शागिर्द — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A Rajasthani snake charmer, a disciple to his craft. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: चिंतन — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A monk in contemplation — light against a sea of black. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: बनारसी दर्शन — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A street sadhu blessing pilgrims at Manikarnika. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Omran Daqneesh — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: The boy from Aleppo — a war's quiet portrait. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Tulip Buddha — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: Buddha rendered in tulip petals — meditation in bloom. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: रफ़्तार — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: An oil painting study. Oil by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Confusion — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: Faces overlapping in a moment of inner doubt. Acrylic by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: अमृतांजलि — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: An offering, painted in deep crimson and gold. Acrylic by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Shadow — by Ankit Agrawal, Missing Palette
image:image.image:caption: A figure half-emerged from darkness. Acrylic by Indian artist Ankit Agrawal.

image:image.image:title: Bhandi Baba — watercolor portrait
image:image.image:caption: Hero image for the watercolor portrait tutorial.

image:image.image:title: Dhalti Muskaan — watercolor portrait of an elderly woman
image:image.image:caption: Layering example in watercolor portrait tutorial.

image:image.image:title: Anidra — watercolor portrait
image:image.image:caption: Final-thought illustration in watercolor portrait tutorial.

image:image.image:title: Banarasi Shaam — Banaras ghat at evening, watercolor
image:image.image:caption: Hero image for the Banaras plein-air post.

image:image.image:title: Banarasi Subah — Banaras at dawn, watercolor
image:image.image:caption: Banaras at dawn from the ghat steps.

image:image.image:title: Banarasi Dhoop — Banaras at midday, watercolor
image:image.image:caption: Banaras at midday from the ghat steps.

image:image.image:title: Banarasi Darshan — sadhu at Manikarnika ghat, oil painting
image:image.image:caption: Oil painting from a later visit to Banaras.

image:image.image:title: BIT Mesra — charcoal sketch of Hostel 4
image:image.image:caption: Hero image: charcoal sketch made outside Hostel 4 Room 113.

image:image.image:title: BIT Mesra — watercolor of campus
image:image.image:caption: Watercolor of BIT Mesra campus from a later visit.
